message:
feat(logger): add SQLite recovery mechanism and new activity event types

Implement periodic SQLite recovery on disabled state with 50-cycle
interval. Fix dropped event delta reporting to report increments
instead of zeroing (M8 audit pattern). Add three new event type
handlers: BallastReplenished, BallastProvisioned, Emergency.
Improve shutdown signal handling with retry for full channels.
Fix u64-to-i64 casts using try_from for safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
